fuzzer_role.value_profile: primary pair A — per-branch winner (no I2SRandReplace mutator)
fuzzer_role.value_profile_cmplog: primary pair B — per-branch loser (I2S splice-back anchors operand to K)

expected_direction: vp > vpc; ratio (vp/vpc) monotone non-decreasing in INEQ_CHAIN_LENGTH

expected_curve_per_fuzzer.value_profile: moderate at N=1, sustained or rising through N=8 (gradient guides each slot independently with no anchor reversion)
expected_curve_per_fuzzer.value_profile_cmplog: moderate at N=1, decaying as N grows (splice-back anchor pressure on K compounds across slots; combinatorial cost to evade simultaneously)

acceptance.rule: vp median > vpc median at INEQ_CHAIN_LENGTH >= 2 AND (vp/vpc ratio at N=8) >= 2 * (vp/vpc ratio at N=1) AND vpc median <= vp median across the entire scan

design_basis: AND-chain of N independent `> K` checks, K=100 (mirrors MAX_TABLE_TAG from cmsio0.c:827). Each slot reads a 4-byte big-endian uint at a distinct offset and tests `> K`. With N CMPs all logging K, I2S dictionary pressure on K compounds; I2SRandReplace splice-back must be evaded simultaneously at all N offsets for the trap to fire. value_profile has CMP_MAP gradient feedback (same Hamming bucketing) but no I2SRandReplace, so its offspring drift past K with no anchor reversion. The K=100 literal mirrors lcms's MAX_TABLE_TAG so the harness reproduces the source-line CMP shape exactly at N=1.
notes: Primary pair is vp (A, winner) vs vpc (B, loser). axis_differ = I2S substitution. This is the Pattern B 'technique-hurts' orientation: A is the per-branch winner WITHOUT the technique; B is augmented with I2S on top of A.
INEQ_CHAIN_LENGTH=1 reproduces lcms cmsio0.c:827 minimum case (one `TagCount > 100`). N=8 is the dose-response endpoint where splice-back combinatorial cost should be most acute.

If the curves flatten (vp ~ vpc at N=8), the splice-back anchor mechanism is bounded by the same scheduler-saturation that refuted strpres v3. Refute and add to the catalog of log-saturated mechanism class.
